languages.text: {n}Ювенна выхватывает бумагу и быстро пробегает ее глазами. На миг кажется, что сейчас последует вспышка возмущения: грудь ее резко вздымается. Однако женщина лишь делает глубокий вдох и рвет приказ на мелкие клочки. Затем мило улыбается:{/n} "Нет ничего зазорного в том, чтобы подготовить бумаги для способного слуги. Это вовсе не значит, что им немедленно дадут ход, верно? А вот что и впрямь нехорошо, так это то, что мои намерения, изложенные на бумаге, оказались в твоих липких пальчиках".

traits.locale_text: {n}Ювенна выхватывает бумагу и быстро пробегает ее глазами. На миг кажется, что сейчас последует вспышка возмущения: грудь ее резко вздымается. languages.text: {n}Juvenna seizes the paper and runs her eyes over it. Her chest rises and falls sharply, and for a moment, it seems as if she is about to explode in outrage. But she merely takes a deep breath and rips up the document into tiny pieces. She then offers you a saccharine smile.{/n} "There is nothing suspect about preparing title papers for a capable servant. That hardly means they will be acted on immediately, surely? What is suspect is how my intentions, set forth on paper, found their way into your grasping hands."

languages.text: {n}尤文娜一把夺过那张纸，迅速扫了一眼。她的胸膛剧烈起伏，仿佛下一秒就要勃然大怒。但她只是深吸了一口气，将那份文件撕得粉碎。随后，她朝你挤出一个甜得发腻的笑容。{/n}“为一个能干的仆人准备授衔文书，有什么可疑的？难道写了就一定马上生效吗？真正可疑的是，我写在纸上的计划，怎么会落到你这双脏手里。”
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna seizes the paper and runs her eyes over it. Her chest rises and falls sharply, and for a moment, it seems as if she is about to explode in outrage. But she merely takes a deep breath and rips up the document into tiny pieces. She then offers you a saccharine smile.{/n} "There is nothing suspect about preparing title papers for a capable servant. That hardly means they will be acted on immediately, surely? What is suspect is how my intentions, set forth on paper, found their way into your grasping hands."

traits.locale_text: {n}尤文娜一把夺过那张纸，迅速扫了一眼。她的胸膛剧烈起伏，仿佛下一秒就要勃然大怒。但她只是深吸了一口气，将那份文件撕得粉碎。随后，她朝你挤出一个甜得发腻的笑容。{/n}“为一个能干的仆人准备授衔文书，有什么可疑的？难道写了就一定马上生效吗？真正可疑的是，我写在纸上的计划，怎么会落到你这双脏手里。”

languages.text: {n}Juvenna vous arrache le document des mains puis le survole. Sa respiration s'accélère jusqu'à ce que vous ayez l'impression qu'elle va exploser d'outrage, mais elle se contente de prendre une grande inspiration et de déchirer le morceau de papier en minuscules morceaux. Elle vous adresse ensuite un sourire mielleux.{/n} « On a bien le droit de préparer des documents en vue d'accorder un titre à un serviteur compétent, non ? Ça n'a rien de suspect et ça ne veut pas forcément dire que l'acte sera officialisé dans l'immédiat. Ce qui éveille les soupçons, en revanche, c'est la façon dont mes intentions, couchées sur le papier, se sont retrouvées entre vos mains. »
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna seizes the paper and runs her eyes over it. Her chest rises and falls sharply, and for a moment, it seems as if she is about to explode in outrage. But she merely takes a deep breath and rips up the document into tiny pieces. She then offers you a saccharine smile.{/n} "There is nothing suspect about preparing title papers for a capable servant. That hardly means they will be acted on immediately, surely? What is suspect is how my intentions, set forth on paper, found their way into your grasping hands."

Ça n'a rien de suspect et ça ne veut pas forcément dire que l'acte sera officialisé dans l'immédiat. Ce qui éveille les soupçons, en revanche, c'est la façon dont mes intentions, couchées sur le papier, se sont retrouvées entre vos mains. »

languages.text: {n}Juvenna, kâğıdı kapıp göz gezdiriyor. Göğsü hızla inip kalkıyor, bir an için öfkeden patlayacakmış gibi görünüyor. Ancak sadece derin bir nefes alıp belgeyi minik parçalara ayırıyor. Ardından sana tatlı bir gülümseme sunuyor.{/n} "Yetenekli bir hizmetkâr için ünvan belgeleri hazırlamakta şüpheli hiçbir şey yok. Bu elbette onların derhâl işleme konacağı anlamına gelmez, değil mi? Asıl şüpheli olan, kâğıda döktüğüm niyetlerimin açgözlü ellerinize nasıl geçtiği."
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna seizes the paper and runs her eyes over it. Her chest rises and falls sharply, and for a moment, it seems as if she is about to explode in outrage. That hardly means they will be acted on immediately, surely? What is suspect is how my intentions, set forth on paper, found their way into your grasping hands."

languages.text: {n}Juvenna te arranca el papel de las manos y lo estudia con la mirada. Su pecho se eleva y cae abruptamente, y, por un instante, parece estar a punto de explotar de furia. En lugar de eso, respira hondo y rasga el documento en mil pedacitos. Después, te ofrece una sonrisa empalagosa.{/n} «No hay nada de sospechoso en preparar un título para un sirviente más que capacitado. Eso no significa necesariamente que vaya a ejecutarse de inmediato, como comprenderá. Lo sospechoso aquí es que mis intenciones, explicitadas en papel, hayan llegado a sus manos».
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna seizes the paper and runs her eyes over it. Her chest rises and falls sharply, and for a moment, it seems as if she is about to explode in outrage. But she merely takes a deep breath and rips up the document into tiny pieces. She then offers you a saccharine smile.{/n} "There is nothing suspect about preparing title papers for a capable servant. That hardly means they will be acted on immediately, surely? What is suspect is how my intentions, set forth on paper, found their way into your grasping hands."

languages.text: {n}Juvenna nimmt das Papier und überfliegt es. Ihre Brust hebt und senkt sich scharf, als würde sie gleich vor Empörung explodieren. Sie atmet allerdings nur tief ein und zerreißt das Dokument in winzige Stücke. Dann schenkt sie dir ein zuckersüßes Lächeln.{/n} "Es ist nichts Verdächtiges daran, Titelpapiere für einen bewährten Diener vorzubereiten. Das heißt schließlich nicht, dass sie sofort umgesetzt werden, oder? Verdächtig ist nur, wie meine auf Papier festgehaltenen Absichten in Eure gierigen Hände gelangt sind."
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna seizes the paper and runs her eyes over it. Her chest rises and falls sharply, and for a moment, it seems as if she is about to explode in outrage. languages.text:
{n}ジュベナは紙を掴み、その内容を目を通す。胸が激しく上下する。怒り狂うかのような表情を浮かべるが、深呼吸をして紙を小さくちぎる。そして甘美な笑顔を向ける。{/n}
「優秀な召使いに権利証を用意することは、何の疑いもない。すぐに実行されるとは限らないだろう。疑わしいのは、私の意図が紙に記され、あなたの手に渡ったことだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna seizes the paper and runs her eyes over it. Her chest rises and falls sharply, and for a moment, it seems as if she is about to explode in outrage. But she merely takes a deep breath and rips up the document into tiny pieces. She then offers you a saccharine smile.{/n} "There is nothing suspect about preparing title papers for a capable servant. That hardly means they will be acted on immediately, surely? What is suspect is how my intentions, set forth on paper, found their way into your grasping hands."
